calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2004 Off Calendar

Quiet Title-Real Property In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-28-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion for Judgment in Quiet Title of Real Property Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Jessica Scianna, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Michele Claudine Mizany and Joanne Marie Dunnigan, also present, were sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, and declaration in support, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defendants: Does 1 through 100, and all persons claiming any legal or equitable right, title, estate, lien or interest in the Property adverse to Plaintiffs' title to the Property as follows:
Plaintiffs were the rightful owners concurently as joint tenants of title in fee simple of the real property known as 2123-2125 Bay St., San Francisco, CA. 94123.
The written instrument that purports to be a Quitclaim Deed and was executed and recorded against the Property by Marie Lewis on Sept. 24, 1998 is hereby void and cancelled.
Judgment signed in open court.
